zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Wyndham於1120年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronet28歲，母親Lady Mary Alanson30歲。她於1142年與Thomas Darell在英國越可爾惠爾德拉可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1176年在英國越可爾隆德享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Wyndham于1120年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronet28岁，母亲Lady Mary Alanson30岁。她于1142年与Thomas Darell在英国越可爾惠爾德拉可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1176年在英国越可爾隆德享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wyndham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Windham  .

variants.name: Windham
meanings: English: habitational name usually from the Norfolk placename Wymondham, which is locally pronounced /wɪndəm/. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wīgmund + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’. By various marriages in the 16th century the Wyndham family of Felbrigg Hall, Norfolk, acquired estates in North Yorkshire and Somerset, for which reason the manor of Orchard in the parish of Watchet, came to be known as Orchard Wyndham in the early 17th century. Later descendants became earls of Egremont, whose estates included Petworth in Sussex. This and other marital acquistions probably explain the post-medieval presence of the surname in Somerset, Devon, Dorset, Wiltshire, Gloucestershire, northern England, and perhaps also (from the late 17th century) in Sussex and Kent. In 1741 Percy Wyndham of the Orchard family inherited the earldom of Thomond, in Ireland, which may account for the currency of the name in Connaght (see 4 below).

English: habitational name perhaps occasionally from Wymondham in Leicestershire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wīgmund (genitive Wīgmundes) + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.
English: habitational name from Wyndham in Shermanbury (Sussex). The placename derives from an Old English personal name Winda + Old English hamm ‘water meadow’.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Wyndham was born in 1120, in Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronet, was 28 and her mother, Lady Mary Alanson, was 30. She married Thomas Darell in 1142, in Wheldrake, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1176, in Lund, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Wyndham est née en 1120, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronet, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Alanson, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Darell en 1142, à Wheldrake, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1176, à Lund, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Wyndham 1120 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronet 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Mary Alanson 30. Sie hat 1142 in Wheldrake, Yorkshire, England Thomas Darell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1176 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Lund, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Wyndham è nata il nel 1120 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronet, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Mary Alanson, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Darell nel 1142, nel Wheldrake, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1176, nel Lund, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Wyndhamが1120年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronetは28歳，母Lady Mary Alansonは30歳であった。1142年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウエルドラクでThomas Darellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1176年にイギリスヨークシュアイアルンドで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Wyndham(이)가 1120년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronet(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary Alanson(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1142년 영국 요르크실르 화드라크에서 Thomas Darell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1176년 영국 요르크실르 런드에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Wyndham nasceu em 1120, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronet, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Alanson, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Darell em 1142, em Wheldrake, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1176, em Lund, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Wyndham родилась в 1120 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronet было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Alanson, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Darell в 1142 г. в местности уелдрек, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1176 г. в местности лунд, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Wyndham nació en 1120, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Wyndham Baronet, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Alanson, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Thomas Darell en 1142, en Wheldrake, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1176, en Lund, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
